settings.quote: The team in Phuket helped me find the perfect fit. Beautiful fabrics and such a calm, welcoming store.
settings.author: Sarah L.

settings.quote: Fisherman's Village store is stunning. I left with two sets and already want to go back on my next trip.
settings.author: Emma M.

settings.quote: Finally found swimwear that actually supports and flatters. The one piece is so well constructed.
settings.author: Jessica R.

settings.quote: Such a lovely experience in Koh Phangan. Helpful styling advice and pieces I still wear every holiday.
settings.author: Amara K.

settings.quote: The resort sarong is a dream. Fabric feels luxurious and the palm print is even better in person.
settings.author: Lucy P.

settings.quote: Quick delivery and the bikini fit exactly as described. Will order again before my next beach trip.
settings.author: Hannah W.

settings.hero_intro: Real feedback from customers who have visited our stores and shopped with us online. We are proud of the experience we create in Phuket, Koh Samui, and Koh Phangan.
settings.rating_blurb: Based on reviews across our stores
settings.summary_text: Every review helps us refine fit, fabric, and the in-store experience. Thank you to everyone who has shared their Bikini Booth moment with us.
settings.main_lead: A selection of recent customer reviews from our island stores and online shoppers.
